member.name: T:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration
member.summary: Castle intrinsic configuration attributes/values

members.member: Thrown when is null or empty>

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.ApiSecret
member.summary: Secret used to authenticate with the Castle Api (Required)

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.FailOverStrategy
member.summary: The response action to return in case of a failover in a Risk or Filter request

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.Timeout
member.summary: Timeout for requests, in milliseconds

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base Castle Api url

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.LogLevel
member.summary: Log level applied by the injected implementation

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.AllowList
member.summary: AllowList for headers in request context object

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.DenyList
member.summary: DenyList for headers in request context object

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.IpHeaders
member.summary: IP Headers to look for a client IP address

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.TrustedProxies
member.summary: Trusted public proxies list

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.TrustedProxyDepth
member.summary: Number of trusted proxies used in the chain

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.TrustProxyChain
member.summary: Is trusting all of the proxy IPs in X-Forwarded-For enabled

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.DoNotTrack
member.summary: If true, no requests are actually sent to the Castle Api, and Risk/Filter return a failover response

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.Logger
member.summary: Your own logger implementation, for internal SDK logging

member.name: P:Castle.Config.CastleConfiguration.Configuration
member.summary: Configuration access from within the SDK

member.name: T:Castle.Headers
member.summary: Recommended request context headers

member.name: T:Castle.Infrastructure.Exceptions.CastleClientErrorException
member.summary: Exception for Castle client errors

member.name: T:Castle.Infrastructure.Exceptions.CastleExternalException
member.summary: Exception that will be allowed to escape the SDK

member.name: T:Castle.Infrastructure.Exceptions.CastleInternalException
member.summary: Exception for internal SDK errors, which must not escape to the outside

member.name: T:Castle.Infrastructure.Exceptions.CastleInvalidParametersException
member.summary: Exception for Unprocessable Entity

member.name: T:Castle.Infrastructure.Exceptions.CastleInvalidTokenException
member.summary: Exception for Invalid request token

member.name: T:Castle.Infrastructure.Exceptions.CastleWebhookVerificationException
member.summary: Thrown when an incoming webhook cannot be verified against the X-Castle-Signature header.

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Requests.ActionRequest.AdditionalData
member.summary: Arbitrary top-level request params not covered by a typed property. Serialized inline, so new API params can be sent without an SDK release. Keys must use the API's raw names (snake_case).

member.name: T:Castle.Messages.Requests.SearchQuery
member.summary: Query payload shared by the list and list-item search endpoints.

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.BatchListItemsResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.CountResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.DeviceContext.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.DeviceItem.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.EventsResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.EventsSchemaResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.ListItemResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.ListResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.Location.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.Policy.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.ScoreItem.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.RiskResponse.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.RiskResponse.Internal
member.summary: The full raw JSON payload as returned by the API, populated on deserialization.

member.name: P:Castle.Messages.Responses.UserAgent.AdditionalData
member.summary: Captures any fields returned by the API that are not mapped to a typed property, so new fields are accessible without an SDK release. Keys are the raw API names (snake_case).

member.name: T:Castle.Messages.Responses.VoidResponse
member.summary: Provides consistent internal interfaces for requests with no response

member.name: M:Castle.Signature.Compute(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes hex-encoded (lower-case) SHA-256 HMAC

member.name: T:Castle.Webhook
member.summary: Verifies the authenticity of incoming Castle webhooks.

member.name: F:Castle.Webhook.SignatureHeader
member.summary: HTTP header carrying the webhook signature.

member.name: M:Castle.Webhook.Verify(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a webhook using the API secret from the active configuration.
member.param: The raw request body, exactly as received.
The value of the X-Castle-Signature header.
member.exception: Thrown when the signature does not match.

member.name: M:Castle.Webhook.Verify(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a webhook against an explicit API secret.
member.param: The raw request body, exactly as received.
The value of the X-Castle-Signature header.
member.exception: Thrown when the signature does not match.
